thesis_summary: Bias remains short only if the gap down is accepted below prior value and early reclaim attempts fail under 29476.

checks.label: Price remains below prior-value reclaim zone
checks.rationale: Short bias depends on sellers defending the gap-down posture below the prior-day open/value area.

checks.label: Opening print does not reclaim into bullish drive
checks.rationale: A fast reclaim would convert the setup from gap-down acceptance into failed liquidation.

checks.label: First 30 minutes fail below 29520
checks.rationale: A push through 29520 would imply buyers are absorbing the gap and targeting prior supply.

checks.label: Price remains below session VWAP
checks.rationale: Short continuation needs VWAP to act as resistance, not support.

checks.label: Morning can pressure the overnight lower shelf
checks.rationale: Without pressure toward 29245, the setup is more likely balance than directional downside.
